prompt: Grill me on the architecture of this skills repo — I'm thinking of adding a CI/CD pipeline that auto-runs evals on every PR.

assertions.text: Response uses the output template format (### [N]. [Topic Title])
assertions.description: The first question must follow the exact markdown template defined in the skill

assertions.text: Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
assertions.description: The skill instructs to ask ONE question at a time
Each question must include the agent's expert opinion

assertions.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or summary
assertions.description: Finality should only come after all questions are answered

assertions.text: Agent notes it used or would use AskUserQuestion tool
assertions.description: The skill explicitly requires AskUserQuestion for interactive experience

assertions.text: Agent explored the codebase before asking (mentions files or structure found)
assertions.description: The skill requires researching the codebase before asking any questions
